home-cta.title: Reveal your iris
home-cta.desc: Starting from €50 · Studio in Avelgem, Belgium

presentation.title: About Planet'Iris
presentation.p1: It all began with a fascination: the hidden beauty in every eye. Emilie and Denis founded Planet'Iris in 2024 in Avelgem, between Kortrijk and Mouscron, with a simple idea: reveal what the naked eye cannot see.
presentation.p2: Through iris macro photography, every session unveils the unique textures, colors and patterns of your gaze. The result is a breathtaking high-definition image: a true personalized work of art, whether for yourself, as a gift, or to immortalize a family moment.
presentation.p3: Because every iris is a unique imprint, just like your fingerprints, and that deserves to be seen.

vos-iris.title: Discover Your Unique Irises
vos-iris.desc: Did you know your iris is as unique as your fingerprints? With our macro lens, we get within millimetres of your eye to reveal every detail: the textures, the colour nuances, the patterns you've never really seen. The result will surprise you, guaranteed.

1.label: Being alone is sometimes better than bad company. And honestly, your iris speaks for itself.
1.alt: Photo of a single iris by Planet'Iris

2.label: Your other half also has a gorgeous iris? Time to find out and immortalize it.
2.alt: Photo of two irises by Planet'Iris

3.label: Two was good. Three is better. Especially when you can hang them on the wall.
3.alt: Photo of three irises by Planet'Iris

4.label: Because the family resemblance shows in the eyes too. Spoiler: it's often striking.
4.alt: Photo of four irises by Planet'Iris

5.label: At this point, it's basically an art gallery. Just missing the price tag.
5.alt: Photo of five irises by Planet'Iris

6.label: Six irises, the whole family. Grandparents included. They deserve their spot on the wall.
6.alt: Photo of six irises by Planet'Iris

tarif-section.delivery-desc: We deliver digital files within 3 business days and prints within 15 business days from receipt of the digital file.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before booking your session.
faq.q1: What happens during a photo session?
faq.a1: The session lasts about 30 minutes in our studio in Avelgem. No special preparation is needed. Our macro lens gets within a few millimetres of your eye to capture every detail of your iris: textures, colours, patterns, in the best conditions.
faq.q2: Does it hurt or is it dangerous?
faq.a2: Not at all. The device never touches your eye. The session uses only soft light and a macro lens. It's a pleasant, contactless experience, accessible to everyone. Contact lens wearers simply need to remove them before the session.
faq.q3: How long before I receive my photos?
faq.a3: High-definition digital files are delivered within 3 business days of your session. Prints are available within 15 business days from receipt of the digital file. The digital file is included with any print order.
faq.q4: What print formats and materials do you offer?
faq.a4: We offer several materials (paper, aluminium…) and different ratios (square, rectangle, round). Dimensions vary by format. Check our Pricing page for full details on formats, dimensions and available prices.
faq.a5: Yes, children are welcome. A supplement of €35 per child under 12 applies, due to the extra care needed to focus on a moving iris.
faq.a6: Yes! A supplement of €65 per animal applies. Contact us beforehand via our social media to check feasibility depending on the type of animal.
faq.a7: Our studio is located in Avelgem (8580), Belgium, between Kortrijk and Mouscron. The exact address will be communicated upon confirmation of your appointment.
faq.q8: How do I book a session?
faq.a8: Booking is done exclusively via private message on our social media: Facebook (planet.iris.belgique) or Instagram (planet_iris_belgique). We will reply as soon as possible to arrange a date.

mentions-legales.data-desc: In accordance with applicable law, you have the right to access, correct, modify and delete data concerning you. You can exercise this right by sending an email to contact@planetiris.com.
mentions-legales.cookies-desc: Planet'Iris may ask for your acceptance of cookies for statistical and display purposes. A cookie is information stored on your hard drive by the server of the site you visit.
mentions-legales.links-desc: Planet'Iris may contain hyperlinks to other sites on the Internet. Links to these other resources will take you away from the Planet'Iris website.
mentions-legales.contact-desc: For any questions or information about the website, you can contact us at: contact@planetiris.com.

politique.title: Privacy Policy
politique.intro-desc: Welcome to Planet'Iris. We take the privacy of your personal data very seriously. This privacy policy explains what information we collect, how we use it and how we protect it.
politique.collect-desc: We collect various types of information in order to provide and improve our services:
politique.collect-li1: Personal information: when you use our website, we may collect information such as your name, email address, and any other information you voluntarily provide.
politique.collect-li2: Usage information: we use Google Analytics to collect information about how you use our website.
politique.use-desc: We use the information collected for the following purposes:
politique.use-li2: Personalise your experience on our website
politique.use-li3: Analyse website usage and improve its performance
politique.use-li4: Send marketing communications if you have consented
politique.sharing-desc: We do not sell, trade or transfer your personal information to third parties without your consent, except for the purposes described in this policy.
politique.ga-desc: We use Google Analytics to collect information about the use of our website. You can prevent Google Analytics from recognising you on future visits by disabling cookies in your browser.
politique.security-desc: We implement a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information.
politique.rights-desc: In accordance with applicable legislation, you have the following rights:
politique.rights-li3: Request erasure of your personal data
politique.rights-li4: Restrict the processing of your personal data
politique.rights-li5: Object to the processing of your personal data
politique.rights-li6: Request portability of your personal data
